headline: Costco quietly slashed prices on popular items
summary: The first time I visited a Costco warehouse, circa 2005, I was floored by the almost unbelievably low prices I saw. Those ultra-low prices are long gone, though. Like many retailers, Costco has been forced to raise its prices through the years to keep up with inflation. And that's ...

headline: Outdoor Brands, LLC Accelerates Retail Footprint and Operational Investments Ahead of 2026 Grilling Season
summary: Outdoor Brands, LLC, parent company of Pit Boss®, Charbroil® and Oklahoma Joe's®, today announced expanded retail distribution agreements, new channel programs and infrastructure investments as it enters the 2026 grilling season with increased operational scale across North America. The announcements highlight the company's continued growth across both fuel and equipment categories, reinforcing Outdoor Brands' position as one of the most widely distributed outdoor cooking portfolios in the marke

headline: What $150-per-barrel oil would mean for gas prices
summary: Oil (CL=F, BZ=F) prices surged past $100 per barrel. Russell Investments Global chief investment strategist Paul Eitelman explains to Opening Bid host Brian Sozzi what potentially recessionary $150 oil would mean for gas prices, while Yahoo Finance Senior Reporter Brooke DiPalma elaborates on how wholesale retailers like Costco (COST) could be impacted. To watch more expert insights and analysis on the latest market action, check out more Opening Bid.

headline: Costco Expands Fertility Care And Fuel Access To Deepen Membership Value
summary: Costco Wholesale (NasdaqGS:COST) is working with Sesame and IVI RMA North America to expand fertility care access for U.S. members. The partnership offers coordinated fertility services and potential savings on related medications through Costco pharmacy programs. Costco is also building standalone gas stations in Honolulu, Hawai'i, with additional sites planned, including Mission Viejo, California. These moves reflect a push to broaden health related services and extend Costco's physical...
